concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' lacks concrete deliverable - does not specify exact directories/files to create. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without knowing which paths to create.

T003 'Configure linting and formatting tools' lacks concrete deliverable - does not specify config file names (e.g., .flake8, pyproject.toml) or exact settings. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.

T027 'Create pilot study validation stub' uses vague term 'stub' without defining concrete deliverable. FR-011 requires actual validation workflow or peer-reviewed citation - 'stub' does not satisfy this requirement.
T029 'Documentation updates in specs/...' lacks concrete deliverable - does not specify which documents, what content, or what format. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.
T030 'Code cleanup and refactoring across all modules' is too vague - does not specify which modules, what cleanup criteria, or success conditions. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.

T033 'Document constitutional conflicts (VI, VII)' lacks concrete deliverable - does not specify output file path, format, or required content. Plan.md already documents these conflicts; task should specify where/how to document resolution status.
